TaskDescription: Participants listen to prerecorded speech stimuli presented via audio playback while EEG is recorded.
Instructions: Listen carefully to the presented speech stimuli while remaining still and minimizing unnecessary movement.
EEGPlacementScheme: Custom left-hemisphere-dominant subset from a high-density g.Pangolin grid
Notes: Stored channels are 0-127 EEG, 128-129 listening audio monitor, 130-131 speaking microphone monitor, 132-133 EOG pair, 134-135 upper-lip EMG pair, 136-137 lower-lip EMG pair, 138 auxiliary mastoid/unused, and 139 trigger.
